tasks.title: Replace smoke detector batteries
tasks.description: The smoke detector in the hallway started beeping overnight. Replace batteries in all three detectors on the main floor.

tasks.title: Pick up prescription for Sam
tasks.description: Sam's monthly allergy prescription is ready at the pharmacy. Pick up before the weekend.

tasks.title: Pay electricity bill
tasks.description: Quarterly electricity bill is due. Log in to the utility portal and pay the balance of $187.

tasks.title: Buy Mia's school shoes
tasks.description: Mia has outgrown her current school shoes. Buy a new pair in size 4 before the school trip.

tasks.title: Schedule annual furnace service
tasks.description: Book the HVAC technician for the annual furnace inspection and filter replacement before winter sets in.

tasks.title: Leo's soccer registration
tasks.description: Register Leo for the fall soccer league. Deadline is October 22nd and the fee is $85.

tasks.title: Rake leaves in backyard
tasks.description: The maple tree has dropped most of its leaves. Rake and bag them before the neighborhood cleanup day.

tasks.title: Return library books
tasks.description: Three overdue library books need to be returned. Also renew Mia's reading card which expires this month.

tasks.title: Halloween costume shopping
tasks.description: Take the kids to the costume shop to pick out Halloween costumes. Budget is $40 per child.

tasks.title: Fix loose handrail on stairs
tasks.description: The handrail on the main staircase has come loose from the wall. Tighten screws and apply wood filler as needed.

tasks.title: Grocery run — weekly staples
tasks.description: Standard weekly grocery shop: produce, dairy, bread, and pantry restocking. Check the family meal plan before going.

tasks.title: Mia's dentist appointment
tasks.description: Mia's six-month checkup at Dr. Patel's office. Appointment is at 3:30 PM — need to pick her up from school early.

tasks.title: Set up holiday card mailing list
tasks.description: Update the family holiday card spreadsheet with new addresses from the year. Order cards by end of November.

tasks.title: Cancel unused gym membership
tasks.description: The old gym membership has been going unused for three months. Call to cancel before the next billing cycle on Nov 15.

tasks.title: Leo's flu shot
tasks.description: Book Leo's annual flu vaccination at the pediatrician or local pharmacy. He didn't get it last year.

tasks.title: Caulk bathroom tiles
tasks.description: The caulk around the master bath shower has started to peel and discolor. Remove old caulk and apply fresh sealant.

tasks.title: Submit insurance renewal paperwork
tasks.description: Home insurance renewal documents arrived in the mail. Review, sign, and mail back with updated coverage options.

tasks.title: Buy winter coats for kids
tasks.description: Both Mia and Leo have outgrown last year's coats. Shop sales before the first real cold snap.

tasks.title: Thanksgiving grocery shopping
tasks.description: Buy all ingredients for Thanksgiving dinner including the turkey, sides, and dessert items. Pre-order turkey from the butcher.

tasks.title: Repair fence gate latch
tasks.description: The back garden gate latch is broken and the gate swings open on its own. Replace the spring-loaded latch mechanism.

tasks.title: Order holiday gifts online
tasks.description: Place online orders for family gifts before shipping deadlines. Check the shared gift list spreadsheet for everyone's wishes.

tasks.title: Car oil change
tasks.description: Alex's car is due for an oil change at 65,000 miles. Book a service appointment at the dealership or quick lube.

tasks.title: Mia's piano recital preparation
tasks.description: Help Mia practice her recital piece every evening this week. The recital is on December 10th at the community center.

tasks.title: Decorate for the holidays
tasks.description: Bring down the decoration boxes from the attic and set up the tree, wreaths, and outdoor lights. Family activity.

tasks.title: Schedule eye exam for Alex
tasks.description: Alex hasn't had an eye exam in two years. Book an appointment with the optometrist before year-end so insurance covers it.

tasks.title: Wrap and mail gifts to grandparents
tasks.description: Wrap the gifts for both sets of grandparents and ship via priority mail to arrive before December 24th.

tasks.title: Clean out fridge before holidays
tasks.description: Toss expired items and clean shelves in the fridge to make room for holiday leftovers and party food.

tasks.title: Leo's school winter concert
tasks.description: Leo's class is performing at the school winter concert. RSVP for four seats and buy a small bouquet of flowers.

tasks.title: Review family budget for the year
tasks.description: Pull together spending data from the year and review against the budget. Identify savings goals for next year.

tasks.title: Donate old kids clothes
tasks.description: Sort through the boxes of outgrown children's clothing and donate usable items to the local shelter before year end.

tasks.title: Replace windshield wipers
tasks.description: Sam's car windshield wipers are streaking badly in the rain. Replace with all-weather blades before winter storms.

tasks.title: Set up kids' savings accounts
tasks.description: Open custodial savings accounts for Mia and Leo at the credit union. Deposit the holiday gift money they received.

tasks.title: Book pediatrician annual checkup for Mia
tasks.description: Mia is due for her annual physical. Schedule with Dr. Okafor and request updated vaccination records for the school file.

tasks.title: Organize hall closet
tasks.description: The hall closet has become a dumping ground. Sort, donate, and organize coats, boots, and sports equipment.

tasks.title: File Q4 tax documents
tasks.description: Gather all year-end tax documents — W2s, investment summaries, charitable donation receipts — and file with the accountant.

tasks.title: Buy new bath towels
tasks.description: The master bath towels are worn thin. Buy a set of four bath towels and two hand towels to replace them.

tasks.title: Leo's book report help
tasks.description: Leo has a book report on Charlotte's Web due January 26th. Help him outline and proofread his draft.

tasks.title: Defrost and clean deep freezer
tasks.description: The chest freezer in the garage needs a full defrost and wipe-down. Inventory what's inside and toss anything older than a year.

tasks.title: Renew Sam's car registration
tasks.description: Sam's car registration sticker expires January 31st. Pay online and get the new sticker before the deadline.

tasks.title: Replenish medicine cabinet
tasks.description: Check expiry dates on all medicines and first-aid supplies. Restock anything running low or expired.

tasks.title: Get Valentine's Day card and gift for Sam
tasks.description: Pick up a card and a small gift for Sam for Valentine's Day. She mentioned liking the lavender candles from the market.

tasks.title: Fix dripping bathroom tap
tasks.description: The kids' bathroom sink has been dripping overnight. Replace the cartridge in the single-lever faucet.

tasks.title: Mia's Valentine's Day cards for class
tasks.description: Help Mia make or buy 24 Valentine's Day cards for her classmates. She wants to attach mini candy hearts.

tasks.title: Check gutters for winter debris
tasks.description: Ice and leaves from winter may have clogged the gutters. Inspect and clear any blockages before spring rains.

tasks.title: Renew streaming subscription
tasks.description: The family's streaming service subscription expired. Compare current plans and renew or switch to a better one.

tasks.title: Leo's science fair project
tasks.description: Help Leo build his volcano project for the school science fair on February 28th. Buy materials and do a test run.

tasks.title: Book anniversary dinner reservation
tasks.description: Alex and Sam's anniversary is March 5th. Book a table at their favorite Italian restaurant — call ahead, they fill up fast.

tasks.title: Sort out garage shelving
tasks.description: The garage shelves are overloaded and one bracket is loose. Reinforce brackets and redistribute weight across shelves.

tasks.title: Sam's annual GP checkup
tasks.description: Sam's annual general practitioner visit for bloodwork and wellness review. Appointment needs to be booked in advance.

tasks.title: Plant early spring seeds indoors
tasks.description: Start tomatoes, peppers, and herbs indoors in seed trays to transplant in May. Set up grow lights in the basement.

tasks.title: Buy new bed pillows
tasks.description: The pillows in the master bedroom are flat and past their prime. Buy two new supportive pillows.

tasks.title: Pay quarterly estimated taxes
tasks.description: Q1 estimated tax payment is due March 15th. Log into the IRS portal and make the payment to avoid underpayment penalty.

tasks.title: Deep clean kitchen appliances
tasks.description: Clean inside the oven, microwave, and dishwasher filter. Wipe down the fridge coils while at it.

tasks.title: Mia's spring dance class signup
tasks.description: Sign Mia up for the spring ballet session at the community center. Registration opens March 1st and spots fill fast.

tasks.title: Replace porch light fixture
tasks.description: The front porch light stopped working. Replace the fixture with a new motion-sensor model from the hardware store.

tasks.title: Tire rotation and check
tasks.description: Both cars are overdue for tire rotation and pressure check. Book back-to-back appointments at the tire center.

tasks.title: Restock kids' lunch snacks
tasks.description: The school snack stash is running low. Buy crackers, fruit pouches, granola bars, and juice boxes.

tasks.title: Check roof after winter storms
tasks.description: Several heavy storms this winter may have damaged shingles. Inspect the roof or hire someone to check before spring rains.

tasks.title: Set up raised garden beds
tasks.description: Assemble and fill the two new cedar raised beds in the backyard. Add fresh compost mix before planting season.

tasks.title: Leo's birthday cake order
tasks.description: Order Leo's birthday cake from the bakery — he wants a dinosaur theme with green frosting. Order must be placed 5 days in advance.

tasks.title: Back up family photos to cloud
tasks.description: Sync all photos from phones and the external hard drive to the cloud photo storage. Free up space on devices.

tasks.title: Clean and put away winter gear
tasks.description: Wash all winter coats, hats, and gloves, then store them in the labeled bins in the attic. Bring out the spring jackets.

tasks.title: Get spring allergy medicine
tasks.description: Buy over-the-counter antihistamines for Mia and Leo before pollen season picks up. Check for pediatric dosing.

tasks.title: Schedule appliance repair for dishwasher
tasks.description: The dishwasher top rack has stopped cleaning properly. Call for a repair technician to check spray arm and water pressure.

tasks.title: Refill home office printer ink
tasks.description: Both black and color cartridges are empty. Order compatible cartridges online or pick up at the office supply store.

tasks.title: RSVP to neighbor's housewarming party
tasks.description: The neighbors sent a paper invite for their housewarming on April 3rd. RSVP for four and bring a small gift.

tasks.title: Change HVAC air filter
tasks.description: The air filter is three months old and visibly dusty. Replace with a new MERV-11 filter to maintain air quality.

tasks.title: Leo's spring soccer tryouts
tasks.description: Leo wants to try out for the spring travel soccer team. Register online and drop him off at tryouts on April 1st at 4PM.

tasks.title: Buy potting soil and fertilizer
tasks.description: Pick up two bags of all-purpose potting mix and a slow-release granular fertilizer for the raised garden beds.

tasks.title: Review and update home inventory
tasks.description: Walk through the house and photograph valuables for the insurance home inventory spreadsheet. Note serial numbers on electronics.

tasks.title: Cancel newspaper delivery
tasks.description: The physical newspaper has been piling up unread. Call the publisher to suspend delivery and switch to digital access.

tasks.title: Blood test for Alex
tasks.description: Alex's doctor ordered a fasting blood panel to check cholesterol and thyroid levels. Schedule at the lab clinic.

tasks.title: Mia's school permission slip
tasks.description: Sign and return Mia's permission slip for the April 10th art museum field trip. Include the $12 admission contribution.

tasks.title: Buy new kitchen sponges and cleaning supplies
tasks.description: Stock up on dish sponges, all-purpose spray, and toilet bowl cleaner. Everything's running low at the same time.

tasks.title: Call about overcharge on phone bill
tasks.description: The monthly phone bill was $25 higher than usual. Call customer service to dispute the charge and request a credit.

tasks.title: Patch hole in kitchen wall
tasks.description: There's a drywall hole behind the pantry door where the doorknob punches through. Patch with compound and paint to match.

tasks.title: Pick up birthday cake for Sam
tasks.description: Sam's birthday is November 12th. Order a custom cake from the bakery and pick it up the day before.

tasks.title: Renew first aid kit supplies
tasks.description: The car first aid kit is missing bandages, antiseptic wipes, and the emergency blanket. Restock from the pharmacy.

tasks.title: Mia's glasses adjustment
tasks.description: Mia's glasses have been slipping down her nose. Take her to the optician for a free adjustment.

tasks.title: Service outdoor gas grill
tasks.description: Before putting the grill away for winter, clean the grates, check the gas line, and cover with a weatherproof cover.

tasks.title: Pay annual HOA fee
tasks.description: The homeowners association annual fee of $420 is due December 1st. Pay via check or the HOA online portal.

tasks.title: Leo's vision screening
tasks.description: Leo failed the school vision screening. Get a full exam at the optometrist to check if he needs glasses.

tasks.title: Refinish scratched hardwood floor
tasks.description: The entryway hardwood floor has visible scratches and scuff marks. Sand and refinish the damaged section.

tasks.title: Reduce car insurance premium
tasks.description: Alex's car insurance is up for renewal. Shop comparison sites and call the current insurer to negotiate a lower rate.

tasks.title: Sort and recycle paper clutter
tasks.description: The home office desk is buried in papers. Sort bills, school notices, and documents into keep/shred piles.

tasks.title: Research summer camp options for Mia
tasks.description: Look into local summer day camps for Mia. Compare art camps and nature programs, and check registration deadlines.

tasks.title: Install new smart thermostat
tasks.description: The old thermostat needs replacing. Install the new Nest thermostat purchased over the holidays and connect to the app.

tasks.title: Leo's speech therapy consultation
tasks.description: Leo's teacher suggested a speech therapy evaluation. Schedule a consultation with the recommended specialist.

tasks.title: Get quotes for bathroom renovation
tasks.description: The main bathroom is due for an update. Get three quotes from contractors for new tile, vanity, and fixtures.

tasks.title: Buy new welcome mat and door hardware
tasks.description: The front door mat is worn out and the door handle scratched. Replace both before the housewarming season.

tasks.title: Reseal basement windows
tasks.description: Cold air is seeping in through the basement window frames. Apply foam weatherstripping and caulk around the outside edges.

tasks.title: Prune overgrown rose bushes
tasks.description: The front yard rose bushes need a hard prune before new growth starts. Cut back to healthy bud eyes.

tasks.title: Upgrade router and home WiFi
tasks.description: The old router has dead spots upstairs. Buy a mesh WiFi system and set it up to cover the whole house.

tasks.title: Track down missing school sweatshirt
tasks.description: Mia's school sweatshirt with her name on it went missing after PE. Check the lost and found at school.

tasks.title: Confirm school holiday schedule
tasks.description: Check both kids' school calendars for spring break dates and upcoming teacher-only days. Update the family calendar.

tasks.title: Service lawn mower before spring
tasks.description: Change the oil and sharpen the blade on the lawn mower before the first mow of the season.

tasks.title: Write thank-you cards from holidays
tasks.description: Kids need to write thank-you cards for the gifts received at Christmas. Buy stamps and mail by end of January.

tasks.title: Apply for school lunch discount program
tasks.description: Confirm eligibility and complete online application for the school's reduced lunch program before the March 31st deadline.

tasks.title: Clean out car interior
tasks.description: Both cars need vacuuming, window cleaning, and clearing out the accumulated kid stuff from the back seats.

tasks.title: Alex's annual physical
tasks.description: Alex's yearly physical exam with the GP is overdue. Book and attend before the insurance year resets.

tasks.title: Buy groceries for the week
tasks.description: The fridge is nearly empty after the long weekend. Restock with fresh produce, proteins, and pantry essentials for the week.

tasks.title: Schedule dentist for Mia
tasks.description: Mia is overdue for her six-month dental checkup. Call Dr. Patel's office to book an appointment and confirm insurance coverage.

tasks.title: Fix leaky kitchen faucet
tasks.description: The kitchen faucet has developed a slow drip that's gotten worse over the past week. Parts are ordered and sitting on the counter.

tasks.title: Plan Leo's birthday party
tasks.description: Leo's 8th birthday is coming up fast. Finalize the guest list, book the venue, send invites, and arrange the dinosaur-themed decorations.

tasks.title: Renew passport
tasks.description: Alex's passport expires in June and a summer trip is being planned. Submit renewal application with photos and fee immediately.

tasks.title: Help Mia with science project
tasks.description: Mia's class is presenting science fair projects next week. Help her finish the research poster on plant growth and photosynthesis.

tasks.title: Order new vacuum cleaner
tasks.description: The old vacuum has lost suction and the motor sounds strained. Research and order a cordless model with good reviews.

tasks.title: Mow the lawn
tasks.description: The grass has grown quickly with the spring rain and is getting long. First mow of the season — check mower has gas.

tasks.title: Drop off donation bags
tasks.description: Four bags of clothes and household items have been sitting by the door for a week. Drop off at the charity shop on Main Street.

tasks.title: Call plumber about water heater
tasks.description: The hot water heater is making a rumbling sound and the water takes too long to heat. Call a plumber to inspect before it fails.

tasks.title: Plan summer vacation
tasks.description: Research and book destinations for a two-week family summer vacation. Look into beach rentals or national park camping options.

tasks.title: Replace living room curtains
tasks.description: The living room curtains are faded and dated. Choose and order a new set that matches the recently painted walls.

tasks.title: Research new family car
tasks.description: Alex's car is eight years old with high mileage. Research reliable family SUVs in the $35K range and compare financing options.

tasks.title: Sign kids up for swim lessons
tasks.description: Both Mia and Leo need to strengthen their swimming skills before summer. Find a local pool offering group lessons for their age groups.

tasks.title: Paint garden fence
tasks.description: The wooden back fence is peeling and weathered. Strip old paint, prime, and apply a fresh coat of dark green exterior paint.

tasks.title: Organize family photo albums
tasks.description: Years of loose printed photos and digital prints need sorting into albums by year. A rainy weekend project for the whole family.

tasks.title: Get Mia's school supplies for fall
tasks.description: The school supply list for next year is already posted online. Buy early to avoid the August rush and lock in good prices.

tasks.title: Service the car before road trip
tasks.description: The family road trip is in six weeks. Get a full service including oil, brakes, and belts before the long drive.

tasks.title: Deep clean the basement
tasks.description: The basement has accumulated years of boxes, old furniture, and forgotten toys. Sort into keep, donate, and discard piles.

tasks.title: Plan neighborhood BBQ
tasks.description: Organize the annual neighborhood block party BBQ. Set a date, coordinate with neighbors, and arrange food and activities.

tasks.title: Fix leaky kitchen faucet
tasks.description: The kitchen faucet has been dripping for weeks. Replace the cartridge or call a plumber if it needs more work.

tasks.title: Mia's birthday party planning
tasks.description: Plan Mia's 15th birthday. Book the bowling alley, send invitations to 12 friends, order cake from the bakery.

tasks.title: Install window air conditioner
tasks.description: The heatwave is coming. Install the AC unit in the upstairs bedroom and clean filters on the two existing units.

tasks.title: Leo's summer camp registration
tasks.description: Register Leo for the two-week nature camp at the community center. Need to submit medical forms and payment by deadline.

tasks.title: Repaint the front porch
tasks.description: The porch railing is chipped and faded. Sand it down, prime, and apply two coats of white exterior paint.

tasks.title: Family camping trip packing
tasks.description: Pack gear for the weekend camping trip: tent, sleeping bags, cooler, flashlights, first-aid kit, and bug spray.

tasks.title: Renew car insurance
tasks.description: Car insurance expires end of August. Compare quotes from three providers and renew or switch before the deadline.

tasks.title: Back-to-school haircuts
tasks.description: Book haircut appointments for Mia and Leo before school starts. Mia wants layers, Leo wants it short.

tasks.title: Fix broken sprinkler head
tasks.description: Zone 3 sprinkler head is cracked and spraying sideways. Replace with matching pop-up head from the hardware store.

tasks.title: Donate old toys and clothes
tasks.description: Sort through the kids' outgrown clothes and toys. Box up donations for the charity drop-off on Saturday.

tasks.title: Grandma Ruth's anniversary dinner
tasks.description: Plan a surprise dinner for Grandma Ruth's wedding anniversary. Book the Italian restaurant and coordinate with Uncle Tom.

tasks.title: Set up Leo's new desk
tasks.description: Assemble the IKEA desk and bookshelf for Leo's room. Need Allen wrench set and help lifting the top piece.

tasks.title: Winterize the garden beds
tasks.description: Cut back perennials, mulch the flower beds, and cover the rose bushes before the first frost.

tasks.title: Replace the water heater anode rod
tasks.description: The water heater is 5 years old. Replace the anode rod to prevent corrosion and extend the tank's lifespan.

tasks.title: Mia's driver's permit study guide
tasks.description: Help Mia start studying for her learner's permit test. Download the state handbook and set up a practice quiz schedule.

tasks.title: Book summer vacation rental
tasks.description: Research and book a beach house for the August family vacation. Need 3 bedrooms, pet-friendly, within 4 hours drive.

tasks.title: Schedule annual furnace inspection
tasks.description: Book the HVAC company for the fall furnace tune-up. Last year they found a cracked heat exchanger — follow up on warranty.

tasks.title: Leo's science fair project
tasks.description: Help Leo plan and build his science fair entry on plant growth with different light wavelengths. Needs supplies and a display board.

tasks.title: Replace deck boards
tasks.description: Three deck boards near the grill are warped and splintering. Buy matching pressure-treated lumber and replace them.

tasks.title: Plan Thanksgiving dinner
tasks.description: Start planning the Thanksgiving menu and guest list. Confirm who's coming, assign dishes, and order the turkey early.

tasks.title: Mia's college visit schedule
tasks.description: Research and schedule visits to three colleges Mia is interested in. Book hotels and plan driving routes for the fall.

tasks.title: Install smart thermostat
tasks.description: Replace the old thermostat with a Nest. Need to check wiring compatibility and set up the app for scheduling.

tasks.title: Family holiday card photos
tasks.description: Book a photographer for the annual holiday card shoot. Find matching outfits and pick a location with fall foliage.

tasks.title: Clean and reseal the driveway
tasks.description: Power wash the driveway and apply sealcoat. Fill any cracks wider than 1/4 inch before sealing.

tasks.title: Update family emergency kit
tasks.description: Check expiration dates on first-aid supplies, replace batteries in flashlights, and add water purification tablets.

tasks.title: Plant a vegetable garden
tasks.description: Build raised beds in the backyard and plant tomatoes, zucchini, peppers, and herbs. Leo wants to grow pumpkins too.

tasks.title: Schedule pet vaccinations
tasks.description: Both the dog and cat are due for annual shots. Book vet appointments and check if flea prevention needs refilling.

tasks.title: Organize the garage workshop
tasks.description: Sort tools into labeled drawers, mount pegboard for hanging tools, and clear space for the workbench.

tasks.title: Enroll Leo in piano lessons
tasks.description: Leo has been asking about learning piano. Find a local teacher, compare rates, and sign up for weekly lessons.

tasks.title: Christmas gift brainstorm
tasks.description: Start a shared list of gift ideas for each family member. Set a budget and decide on Secret Santa rules.

tasks.title: Renew home insurance policy
tasks.description: Home insurance is up for renewal in January. Get competing quotes and review coverage for flood and earthquake.

tasks.title: Book ski trip for winter break
tasks.description: Find a family-friendly ski resort for the February break. Need ski rentals for Leo and beginner lessons for Sam.

tasks.title: Mia's SAT prep course enrollment
tasks.description: Sign Mia up for an SAT prep course starting in spring. Compare online vs in-person options and check scheduling.

tasks.title: Replace roof shingles
tasks.description: Roofer noted missing shingles during last inspection. Get three bids and schedule repair before spring rains.

tasks.title: Plan Alex's 40th birthday
tasks.description: Surprise party for Alex. Book a venue, create a guest list of 30 people, and arrange catering and decorations.

tasks.title: Install backyard fire pit
tasks.description: Build a stone fire pit in the backyard with a gravel surround. Need to check local fire codes and HOA rules first.

tasks.title: Leo's braces consultation
tasks.description: Schedule orthodontist appointments for Leo. Get quotes from two offices and verify insurance coverage.

tasks.title: Annual tax filing prep
tasks.description: Gather W-2s, 1099s, mortgage interest statement, and charitable donation receipts. Organize for the accountant.

tasks.title: Spring garden planning
tasks.description: Design the spring garden layout. Order seeds for sunflowers, lavender, and wildflower mix. Plan the raised bed rotation.

tasks.title: Upgrade bathroom vanity
tasks.description: The upstairs bathroom vanity is dated and the countertop is stained. Pick a new vanity with double sinks and quartz top.

tasks.title: Family volunteer day signup
tasks.description: Sign up the whole family for the community park cleanup day. Need to register online and bring our own gloves.

tasks.title: Mia's driver's license test
tasks.description: Schedule Mia's driving test. She needs 10 more practice hours and a refresher on parallel parking.

tasks.title: Reseal hardwood floors
tasks.description: The living room and hallway hardwood floors are showing wear. Sand lightly and apply polyurethane. Move furniture first.

tasks.title: Plan summer camp for both kids
tasks.description: Find camps for Mia (art/photography) and Leo (robotics/coding). Compare week-long vs two-week options.

tasks.title: Install EV charger in garage
tasks.description: Get an electrician to install a Level 2 EV charger. Need a 240V outlet and check if the panel can handle the load.

tasks.title: Grandma Ruth's 70th birthday trip
tasks.description: Plan a family trip to visit Grandma Ruth for her 70th. Book flights for 4, arrange a birthday brunch, and find a gift.

tasks.title: Fence gate replacement
tasks.description: The side fence gate latch is broken and the frame is rotting. Replace the entire gate and add a self-closing hinge for the dog.

tasks.title: Kids' annual physicals
tasks.description: Book annual checkups for Mia and Leo. They'll need updated immunization records for school enrollment.

tasks.title: Pressure wash the house siding
tasks.description: Green algae is growing on the north side. Rent a pressure washer and clean all four sides plus the patio.

tasks.title: Set up college savings account for Leo
tasks.description: Open a 529 plan for Leo. Compare state plans, set up automatic monthly contributions, and add grandparents as authorized gifters.

tasks.title: Build a treehouse for Leo
tasks.description: Design and build a small treehouse in the backyard oak. Need plans, lumber, and a free weekend. Leo wants a rope ladder.

tasks.title: Update estate documents
tasks.description: Meet with the attorney to update wills, power of attorney, and beneficiary designations. Last updated 5 years ago.

tasks.title: Family movie marathon schedule
tasks.description: Create a list of 12 family movies for monthly movie nights. Let each family member pick 3 films. Stock up on popcorn.

tasks.title: Replace kitchen backsplash
tasks.description: The kitchen backsplash tiles are cracking. Pick a new subway tile pattern and schedule installation over a long weekend.

tasks.title: Create family recipe book
tasks.description: Collect favorite recipes from both sides of the family into a printed book. Get Grandma Ruth's handwritten recipes scanned.

tasks.title: Mia's first car shopping
tasks.description: Research safe, reliable used cars for Mia's first vehicle. Budget is $8K. Check insurance rates for teen drivers.

tasks.title: Annual gutter cleaning
tasks.description: Clean all gutters and downspouts before the fall leaves. Check for sagging sections and resecure brackets.

tasks.title: Plan family reunion
tasks.description: Organize the biennial family reunion. Book the park pavilion, set up a potluck sign-up sheet, and plan activities for all ages.

tasks.title: Leo's 10th birthday party
tasks.description: Plan Leo's birthday party at the trampoline park. Invite his class, order a dinosaur cake, and prepare goodie bags.

tasks.title: Install outdoor security cameras
tasks.description: Buy and install 4 weatherproof cameras covering the front door, driveway, backyard, and side gate. Set up phone alerts.

tasks.title: School history project
tasks.description: Mia needs to complete a history project on the Civil Rights Movement for her 10th grade class. Includes a written report and a poster presentation.
